title: Fix Incorrect Flip of Bits to Target Count

statement.markdown:
Given an integer num and a target count, flip the bits of num to obtain a number, 
      where the number of one-bits is exactly the target count. The goal is to find the smallest number 
      that satisfies this condition. If it is impossible to obtain the target count, return -1.
statement.inputFormat: An integer num and a target count. The number can be a 32-bit or 64-bit signed integer.
statement.outputFormat: The smallest number with exactly the target count of one-bits.
statement.notes: Note that flipping a bit from 0 to 1 (or vice versa) changes the count of one-bits.

constraints.description: Number of bits in the input integer
